name: sector-forge
description: SectorForge — AI-directed sci-fi dungeon/station tile mapper. Claude designs the deck layout from narrative direction; a deterministic engine renders a top-down battlemap and auto-derives walls, doors, and lighting, exporting Universal VTT (.dd2vtt) and native Foundry VTT v13/v14 scene JSON. Optional hybrid path swaps in ComfyUI z-image art while preserving the VTT data.
